name: Frost Prime
description: Frost Prime has the same chilling abilities as Frost but provides unique mod polarities, allowing for greater customization.
passiveDescription: Cold Status Effects from Frost's Abilities last |DURATION|% longer. Frost gains |ARMOR| Armor for each enemy afflicted with <DT_FREEZE_COLOR>Cold within <AFFINITY_SHARE>Affinity Range.

abilities.name: Freeze
abilities.description: A frigid energy blast that freezes targets in their tracks.

abilities.name: Ice Wave
abilities.description: Sends a wave of razor sharp, crystalized ice toward an enemy, dealing heavy damage.

abilities.name: Snow Globe
abilities.description: Frost deep freezes any vapor and moisture in the area, creating a protective sphere with brief invulnerability to boost its strength.

abilities.name: Avalanche
abilities.description: Summons a treacherous landslide of ice that instantly freezes and shatters all enemies in its radius.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Frost Prime has the same chilling abilities as Frost but provides unique mod polarities, allowing for greater customization.

patchlogs.name: Lua’s Prey: Hotfix 32.2.1
patchlogs.fixes: This will be the default moving forward if we release more Voidshell skins with Armor attachments. For now this fixes Voruna, Frost and Volt’s Base/Voidshell Armor.

patchlogs.name: Update 32.2.0: Lua’s Prey
patchlogs.fixes:
*The Frost Voidshell Skin includes the Frost Voidshell Armor, which can be equipped onto his other skins. Equipping the Armor onto these skins will open the Material Structures menu, but will only apply to the Armor. Similar to equipping a Voidshell Helmet onto another skin.
The Frost Voidshell Collection is available for purchase in the in-game Market.

patchlogs.name: Echoes of Veilbreaker: Hotfix 32.1.2
patchlogs.changes: Adjusted more offsets for the Shard Bane Ephemera on Nidus, Gendel, Chroma, Lavos, Frost, Hildryn, Atlas, Rhino, Ash, and Vauban.

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Update 32
patchlogs.changes:
Increased Frost's Avalanche armor reduction from 40% to 60% and changed the armor reduction to be permanent.
Frost’s Avalanche can also now reduce armor from targets even if they are immune to crowd control abilities. 
Frost (Uranus to Neptune)
Removed the Frost Specter's Avalanche ability.
This proved to be too powerful an ability for the Frost Specter, as it would freeze players on the spot and frequently resulted in being one shot by the Specter. 
Made tweaks to Frost Specter's ability stats. 
Fixed enemies affected by Frost’s Avalanche not losing any armor while Overguard is active.

patchlogs.name: Nora’s Mix Vol.2: Hotfix 31.6.4
patchlogs.changes: Swapped the Frost Specter (Earth-Mars) and Loki Specter (Uranus-Neptune).

patchlogs.name: Update 31.1.0: Echoes of War
patchlogs.changes:
Frost gains 200% Critical Chance and 200% Critical Damage against frozen enemies.
Frostfall Ephemera

patchlogs.name: The New War: Hotfix 31.0.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Ember and Frost (individual) Prime Resurgence Packs not giving the Titan Extractor Prime Blueprint.

patchlogs.name: Nights of Naberus: Hotfix 30.8.1
patchlogs.changes: Updated to Frost Prime Passive description with the “Prime” indication to avoid confusion.

patchlogs.name: Update 30.7: Nidus Prime & Plague Star
patchlogs.changes:
For a long time now we’ve had a precedent with a handful of Warframe Skins where the “None” option for Attachments (and sometimes Syandanas) was removed if certain Skins, Primes, etc were equipped. This applied to Warframes such as Ember Prime/Pyraxis Skin, Frost, Mag Prime, Oberon, Volt, etc.
We now usher in a new “None” era! All Warframes and Warframe Skins that previously did not have the ‘None’ option will have a “None” Attachment or Syandana option, giving you even MORE customization flexibility. This means you can remove details such as any attachments on Ember Pyraxis, Mag Prime, the list goes on and on! In addition, Banshee, Frost and Oberon's default Shoulder Armor can now be equipped on Prime versions of the Warframe.

patchlogs.name: Update 30.5: Sisters of Parvos
patchlogs.changes: Vala Community Glyph by FrostyNovaPrime
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Frostfall Ephemera missing its ice skin FX.

patchlogs.name: Call of the Tempestarii: TennoGen: Update 30.2.0
patchlogs.changes: Frost Strigid Skin by Rekkou

patchlogs.name: Update 29.10.0: Corpus Proxima & The New Railjack
patchlogs.changes:
Railjack combat inherited a lot of the familiar Warframe damage types, but with a twist. Impact became Ballistic, Cold became Frost, and so on. We are removing the second layer of ‘Railjack’ Damage types to unify and have the system be based on what Players already spend time learning: core Warframe elements. This means that:
Frost = Cold
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Frost’s leg stretching and cape (with all Skins, including Frost Prime) clipping through him in the login screen.

patchlogs.name: Star Days: Update 29.8.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Frostfall Ephemera FX persisting while on the Orbiter, even after being unequipped or having switched Warframes.

patchlogs.name: Deimos: Arcana: Prime Vault 29.5.9
patchlogs.changes: Banshee Prime and Mirage Prime return alongside their Prime Weapons and exclusive Customizations for a limited time. Frost Prime Packs, Ember Prime Packs, and their Relics have returned to the Vault.

patchlogs.name: Update 29.5: Deimos Arcana
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Frost/Frost Prime’s capes (on all skins) clipping through him in the login screen.

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Prime Vault: 29.2.0
patchlogs.changes:
Ember Prime and Frost Prime, as well as their Prime Weapons and exclusive Customizations are now available for a limited time! Trinity Prime Packs, Nova Prime Packs, and their Relics have returned to the Vault.
Ember Prime, Frost Prime, Latron Prime, Reaper Prime, Sicarus Prime, and Glaive Prime Relics have been added back to the droptables!
This means the next Prime Vault offering is a tried and true debut of Ember and Frost Prime (full details to come tomorrow). It also means that we are now in a position to make the Vault following Ember and Frost Prime offer new-to-Vault contents because we recognize how important this is.

patchlogs.name: Derelict Shift: Update 28.3.0
patchlogs.changes: Increased the Cold Status Effects from 1 to 6 for these Frost Abilities (which brings it back to pre-Status Changes):

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Railjack Revisited (Part 1): Update 27.4
patchlogs.changes:
Our Healing AoE / Damage Reduction changes posted back on April 3rd have arrived! If you’re unfamiliar, ultimately what we want is more ‘Healing’ Abilities to work to allow for more strategies to emerge in various mission types. Healing these objectives can serve well as an alternative or a complement to the commonly used defensive Abilities, such as Frost's Snow Globe, Gara's Mass Vitrify, Limbo's Cataclysm. 100% heals is not what we want to do, so we are instead allowing the effects with some objective-specific adjustments as to not trivialize the game modes.
Banshee, Excalibur Umbra, Frost, Nekros, Nova, Nyx, Saryn, Valkyr, and Zephyr Ability videos have been added to their respective Arsenals!
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed some rendering artifacts (black squares) that could appear if you killed an enemy and their ragdoll had severed body parts (notably with Frost's Avalanche).

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.11.1
patchlogs.changes:
Manipulate, incinerate and shatter your enemies with this Prime Vault Unsealed. The Prime Vault is open now on all platforms and brings back Loki Prime, Ember Prime and Frost Prime for a limited time. Returning with them are other high-demand Vaulted Prime Accessories and Weapons along with discounted Platinum in four unique packs: the Loki & Ember Dual Prime Pack, the Loki Deception Prime Pack, the Ember Fire Prime Pack, and the Frost Ice Prime Pack: https://www.warframe.com/prime-vault
Ember Prime, Frost Prime, Loki Prime, Wyrm Prime, Bo Prime, Sicarus Prime, Glaive Prime, Latron Prime, and Reaper Prime Relics have been added as Cetus Bounty rewards for a limited time. You can also find these limited Vaulted Relics in Relic Packs from the Market or as Syndicate rewards.

patchlogs.name: Update: Specters of the Rail
patchlogs.changes:
Increased slow duration of Frost’s Icicle in Conclave.
Abilities that exist independent of their creator will not be deactivated if the Warframe enters a nullifier, but will be destroyed if touched by the bubble itself. For example, Frost’s Snowglobe will not disappear when Frost enters the bubble, but will be destroyed if the bubble comes into contact with the Snowglobe sphere.

Frost Prime Parts

patchlogs.changes: Frost’s Snow Globes can now be broken when Freeze is cast on it, causing the Snow Globe to explode and do an AoE ragdoll effect on nearby enemies.

patchlogs.changes: Reduced the health of Frost’s Snow Globe in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.0.2

patchlogs.name: Update 17: Echoes Of The Sentient
patchlogs.changes:
Icons in the Mag Prime and Frost Prime Bundles have been removed from the Market entirely, and will remain in the Vault for possible future release.
Frost's Freeze damage and slow duration has been reduced in PvP.
Frost's Avalanche damage has been reduced in PvP.
The following changes have been made to Frost’s Abilities.  We will continue to monitor Frost after launch to provide adjustments as necessary:
Frost now has a passive ability: enemies who melee attack Frost have a chance to be frozen on impact.
Frost's passive in Conclave applies Chill instead of Freeze.
Frost Prime base shield increased from 150 to 175.

patchlogs.changes: Players should now be able to clearly see the short pulse of Frost’s Snow Globe that indicates its invulnerability period.

patchlogs.name: Update 15.13
patchlogs.changes:
Casting Frost’s Snow Globe inside of a Snow Globe you previously created will combine the health of both globes, eliminating the old Globe in the process. This will allow for greater combat visibility as your view won’t be obscured by opaque stacked Snow-Globe walls!
Frost Prime’s Ice Wave now has a bit of Prime flair to its visual effect.
Frost’s Freeze Force
Made minor visual and audio FX changes to Frost’s Avalanche ability.

patchlogs.fixes: Frost’s Snowglobe now indicates brief invulnerability window.

patchlogs.name: 13.4.0: Serro + Psa!
patchlogs.fixes: Tweaked the emblem offsets on the Frost, Frost Prime, Rhino, and Rhino Prime Warframes.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 13.3.1
patchlogs.fixes: Tweaked the leg armor offsets on the Frost and Frost Prime frames.

patchlogs.name: Update 13.3.0: Pack Hunters
patchlogs.changes:
Set a max limit on the max instances of Frost's Snow Globe sound effects.
Tweaked the ability and energy visuals on numerous Warframes including Rhino, Frost, Nova, Ash, Banshee, Zephyr, Vauban, Volt and Valkyr.

patchlogs.name: Update 13: Dark Sectors
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Frost Prime not having the correct cast sound.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 12.4.5
patchlogs.changes:
Frost Changes:
Using a combination of ideas from the community and discussions between dev, Frost’s Snowglobe has changed. The changes are:

patchlogs.name: Update 12.3.0: The Grustrag Three
patchlogs.fixes: Changed Frost’s Ability Sounds to align with new casting times.Fixes:

patchlogs.name: Update 12.2.0: Castanas!
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed image of Excalibur appearing for Frost Helmet skin.

patchlogs.name: Update 12: Zephyr Rises
patchlogs.changes:
Frost's Freeze now comparable to Ember’s Fireball ability.
Frost’s Avalanche ability now has increased casting speed and damage.
Frost’s Snowglobe now has health in the following values as upgraded/fused: 1500,2500,3000,3500.
Frost’s Ice Wave now force procs slow (chill).

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 10.7.1: Double Resource Weekend!
patchlogs.changes: Stalker has practiced against Frost’s Snowglobe and is no longer affected.

patchlogs.name: Update 10.5.0: The Gradivus Dilemma
patchlogs.changes: New sound for Frost’s Snowglobe ability.

patchlogs.name: Update 9.5: Operation Arid Fear
patchlogs.changes: higher end defense should now be slightly more tolerable for solo play or squads without Frost. Does not scale with additional enemy scaling per wave.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Vauban's powers not working when stuck onto Frost's Snowglobe.

patchlogs.name: Update 9: Vor's Revenge
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed icon for default Frost helmet.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 8.3
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Hammer Boss phases breaking after Frost’s Avalanche ability.
Fixed 'Power In Use' bug when using Frost's Avalanche

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 8.0.2 : Comin In' Hot!
patchlogs.fixes: Frost Powers not working

patchlogs.name: Update 7.9.0: The Glaive
patchlogs.changes: Frost power mods moved to common pool, increased chance for drops.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Frost's Freeze power not being affected by Continuity mod.
Fixed Frost's Snow Globe power not being affected by Continuity and Range mods.

patchlogs.name: Update 6.3 Hotfixes
patchlogs.fixes: Boosted Rhino and Frost base sprint by 5%.

patchlogs.name: Update 6: Hotfixes
patchlogs.fixes: Nyx, Frost and Excalibur Alt Helmet changes

patchlogs.name: Update 6 - "New Stompin’ Grounds"
patchlogs.additions: Frost! A new ice-based Warframe with chilling power!
